classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪框对应完整标注源图中的绿色框侧面视图，包含外形轮廓、中心线、剖面/侧面几何以及尺寸标注'28.5'、'28'、'24'、'48'、'Ø55'、'Ø60'、'14.5'和'力测量原点'引出线，属于零部件安装与外形尺寸表达。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR read as 241; corrected to 24 based on visible top width dimension and engineering context.
Added diameter symbol from visible vertical diameter callout.
OCR read as ∅9; corrected to Φ60 based on visible vertical diameter callout.
Merged split OCR words and restored spacing.

terminology_notes: Φ is normalized as diameter symbol for visible diameter callouts.
translation_notes: Force measurement origin translated as 力测量原点.

dimension_records.reason: Top horizontal dimension line spans the widest upper side profile.
Second top horizontal dimension line marks an intermediate width.
Third top horizontal dimension is visibly 24; OCR included line artifact as 241.
Left vertical dimension line defines the height from upper feature to the force-origin horizontal datum line.
Right-side inner vertical diameter callout is clearly marked Φ55.
Right-side outer vertical diameter callout is visibly Φ60, though OCR misread the numeric portion.
Leader points to the marked origin location on the side view.
Bottom horizontal dimension defines the offset from the force measurement origin centerline to the side reference edge.
Text is the view label, not a dimensional value.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Not specified in this side-view crop.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Not specified in this side-view crop.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Visible side-view dimensions include 28.5, 28, 24, 48, Φ55, Φ60, and 14.5 mm.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Not specified in this side-view crop.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: OCR fragments and line artifacts were removed; no additional dimensions were created without OCR source IDs.

labels.translation_en_full: 6 x M4 threaded holes depth 6 (equally spaced)

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域为正面测力面机械结构图，含圆形法兰、安装孔、中心孔及多处尺寸引线，标注有'Φ78'、'Φ69'、'Φ40'、'Φ38'、'Φ10'、'2X Φ4'、'4 x Φ5.3通（均布）'、'6 x M4 ▽ 6（均布）'以及角度和公差，属于零部件安装与外形尺寸表达。

records.translation_en_full: 6 x M4 threaded holes depth 6 (equally spaced)

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected missing diameter symbol from visible callout; overlapping ocr_001 is a partial duplicate.
Added visible diameter symbol.
Added visible diameter symbol; ocr_011 is a duplicate partial reading.
Added visible diameter symbol.
Added visible diameter symbol; ocr_014 is a duplicate partial reading.
OCR misread the angled 45° callout as 15.
OCR fragments at the 60° callout location were corrected using visible text; confidence reduced due to poor OCR.
Merged split diameter, upper tolerance, lower tolerance, and depth callout.
Merged split 2X callout and corrected OCR confusion around Φ4 and tolerance; lower 0 and depth 4 are visible but not separately reliable in OCR.
Merged count, multiplier, and diameter value; added visible diameter symbol.
Visible callout includes depth information, but only 6xM4 was available in the provided OCR source box.

terminology_notes: ▽ is treated as a depth symbol where attached to hole callouts.
Φ and ∅ are normalized as diameter symbols.
translation_notes: Cable is retained as English source text.
Hole and mounting terms are normalized into bilingual engineering descriptions.

dimension_records.reason: Vertical cable label identifies the cable diameter.
Dimension line across the top body marks a linear width.
Leader points to the largest circular envelope.
Leader points to an intermediate circular feature.
Leader points to a smaller concentric circular feature.
Leader points to another smaller concentric circular feature.
Angular dimension is shown on the left side of the circular pattern.
Angular dimension is visible near the lower-left arc, but OCR quality is imperfect.
Angular dimension is visually present, but OCR source fragments are weak.

dimension_records.parameter_zh: 中心孔直径及公差深度
dimension_records.parameter_en: Central hole diameter with tolerance and depth
dimension_records.reason: Right-side leader callout points to the central hole and includes diameter, tolerance, and depth.

dimension_records.parameter_en: Two holes diameter with tolerance and depth
dimension_records.reason: Right-side callout is split and partly misread by OCR, but the visible engineering callout indicates 2X Φ4 with tolerance and depth.
Callout indicates four diameter 5.3 holes; through/equally spaced note is visible in context but not fully captured in OCR.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: 6 x M4 threaded holes; depth Not specified from OCR
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 6处 M4 螺纹孔；OCR未可靠提供深度
dimension_records.reason: OCR source supports 6 x M4; visible depth 6 is not reliably available in the provided source boxes.

frontend_table_records.parameter: Central hole diameter with tolerance and depth
Two holes diameter with tolerance and depth

frontend_table_records.specification: 6 x M4 threaded holes; depth Not specified from OCR

audit_table_records.parameter_zh: 中心孔直径及公差深度
audit_table_records.parameter_en: Central hole diameter with tolerance and depth
Two holes diameter with tolerance and depth

audit_table_records.normalized_specification: 6处 M4 螺纹孔；OCR未可靠提供深度

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Front mounting face includes circular patterns with angular callouts 30°, 45°, and 60°, plus 4 x Φ5.3 holes and 6 x M4 threaded holes.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: No shaft or keyway interface is specified in this region.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Visible circular diameters include Φ78, Φ69, Φ40, and Φ38; top body width is 25.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Depth 6 for the 6 x M4 callout and Chinese notes such as equally spaced/through are visible in the image but not fully supported by the provided OCR source boxes.

unresolved_items.issue: Deleted or not used because these are overlapping duplicates, partial fragments, or likely line/shape misrecognitions that do not form independent engineering annotations.
The image visibly shows a depth value after 6 x M4, but the provided OCR data only reliably supplies 6xM4; depth is therefore not normalized as a fully supported value.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内为背面安装面机械视图，包含圆形安装面、孔位分布、引线标注、角度'30°'和'15°'、直径'Φ50'、螺纹孔'4 x M5 深 5（均布）'以及'2X Φ4'、'Φ10'等公差尺寸；完整标记源图确认该区域对应'背面-安装面'，属于机械结构尺寸与安装孔位图。

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected missing diameter symbol from visible callout context.
Merged overlapping OCR fragments and corrected depth symbol to 深.
Added degree symbol visible in the drawing.
Corrected partial OCR digit to visible angular callout 15°.
Corrected composite OCR into diameter tolerance and depth callout.
Merged stacked tolerance, diameter value, zero lower deviation and depth callout; corrected ? to Φ and J2 to 深2.

terminology_notes: 深 indicates depth in mechanical hole callouts.
translation_notes: Chinese depth symbol 深 normalized as depth.

dimension_records.reason: Callout points to the main circular outer feature.
Leader points to equally spaced rear mounting threaded holes.
Angular dimension shown at left side of circular hole pattern.
Angular dimension shown at left side; OCR captured only the trailing digit but visual callout indicates 15°.

engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Not specified in this cropped rear mounting-face region.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Outer circular feature is marked Φ50.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Not specified in this cropped region.

unresolved_items.issue: Discarded as duplicate, partial, overlapping, or geometry-derived OCR fragments not used as independent final annotations.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪框对应完整图中左下角紫色标注的三维外形视图，显示圆柱主体、安装法兰、孔位、顶部螺钉孔和侧向连接器外形；未见针脚功能、线色、接线表或性能曲线信息，工程含义为零部件机械结构外形展示。

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: No reliable visible text annotations are present in the target crop; mounting interface dimensions are not specified from available OCR sources.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: All OCR source boxes in the target crop appear to be false positives from holes, edges, outlines, or fastener geometry rather than readable engineering text.

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
